rationale: Adds a single new file .github/copilot-instructions.md (149 lines) onboarding the Copilot cloud agent to the repo. Sections cover Quick Start with pointers to docs/codebase/STACK.md and STRUCTURE.md, the sequential file-based pipeline diagram (Engine to Ranker to Exporter to Exposure Report), and a module responsibility table for src/nba_optimizer/engine.py, ranker.py, exporter.py, exposure_report.py, late_swapper.py, config.py, utils.py, and orchestrator.py. Environment variable docs cover NBA_ENTRIES_PATH, NBA_PROJS_DIR, NBA_LINEUP_DIR, and NBA_OUTPUT_DIR. Build and run commands like pip install -e . and python scripts/run_optimizer.py -n 2500 -r 0.25 are listed alongside seven enumerated pitfalls including stale CSV pickup, dual load_data divergence between engine and late_swapper, and Windows ProcessPoolExecutor quirks. Pure documentation addition with no code or test changes, and the closed-without-merge placement reflects a maintainer policy choice rather than a defect in the diff.
